title: illicium parvifolium subsp. oligandrum
intro: Illicium parvifolium subsp. oligandrum, also known as star anise, is a type of plant that belongs to the Illicium genus and is native to southern China. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Illicium parvifolium subsp. oligandrum include reducing nausea and vomiting, relieving digestive issues, and exhibiting antioxidant properties. Illicium parvifolium subsp. oligandrum can be prepared as an herbal tea, capsule, or oil, and is also used in cooking, particularly in the form of whole seeds or ground powder.
